name: DEVELOPMENTAL DYSPLASIA OF HIP (DDH
definition: CONGENITAL DYSPLASIA OF HIP deformity of acetabulum ← disrupted relationship between femoral head and acetabulum

demographics.Age: most dislocations probably occur after birth;
demographics.Prevalence: 0.25-0.85% of all newborn infants (⅔ are firstborns)

discriminating_features: mild marginal abnormalities in acetabular cartilage
